Event: Magic Training - Pterobot
Event Date: 21/11/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM26
Pterobot Tamer Amulet

Once in a while, the unit gains a shield that absorbs damage of any type equal to 100% of the amulet owner's missing health for 4 sec. While the shield is active, every second the unit restores 10% of their max health. When the shield wears off or is removed, the unit deals physical damage equal to 70% of their current health to all enemies in a small radius around the unit.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
